caption: You still coming up for the 4th? Need a headcount before I commit to the cooler situation.
Yes! Driving up Friday night. Can I bring Jake?
Obviously. Just FYI I have yoga at 7 Saturday and then practice at Corcoran, so don't expect me functional before noon.
It's a holiday weekend Grace 😂
Field hockey doesn't take holidays. Still need to confirm Maya's even showing up.
Does Mom know we're all descending on her?
Called her Tuesday. She's already planning a full spread. Dad's on grill duty.
Perfect. See you Friday 🎆
